mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TYPE_NAME, PARENT_ID, CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_TYPE WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0
AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId}
AND (PARENT_ID IS NULL OR PARENT_ID = 0)
ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT t1.ID, t1.TYPE_NAME, t1.PARENT_ID, t1.CATEGORY_LEVEL, t1.SORT_ORDER, t1.CREATE_BY, t1.CREATE_BY_NAME, t1.CREATE_TIME, t1.UPDATE_BY, t1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, t1.UPDATE_TIME, t1.DEL_FLAG, t1.DELETE_BY, t1.DELETE_BY_NAME, t1.DELETE_TIME, t2.TYPE_NAME AS PARENT_NAME FROM E_M_EQPT_TYPE t1 LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_TYPE t2 ON t1.PARENT_ID = t2.ID WHERE t1.ID = #{id} AND t1.DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_TYPE ( ID, TYPE_NAME, PARENT_ID, CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{typeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{categoryLevel,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_TYPE
TYPE_NAME = #{typeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CATEGORY_LEVEL = #{categoryLevel,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_M_EQPT_TYPE SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM E_M_EQPT_TYPE WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
